center.name: 北里奥格兰德州
center.summary: 北里奥格兰德州是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联10种鸟类，包括East Brazilian chachalaca、Swallow-winged puffbird、Green-backed becard等10种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: bahiae is found in northeastern Brazil in an area roughly bounded by extreme eastern Maranhão, Rio Grande do Norte, and northern Bahia. The black-bellied antwren inhabits the understorey to mid-storey of tropical deciduous forest, gallery forest, caatinga scrublands, and the ecotone between caatinga and cerrado

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Caatinga antwren is found in north-central and eastern Brazil, in southern Pará and from Maranhão east to Rio Grande do Norte and south to Bahia and just into northern Minas Gerais.{{cite journal |last1=Pacheco |first1=J

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The East Brazilian chachalaca is found in a fairly narrow strip of far eastern Brazil, from Rio Grande do Norte south into Espírito Santo and Minas Gerais

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in eastern and southern Brazil south from a line roughly southwest from Ceará and Rio Grande do Norte to west-central Mato Grosso

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: One population is found in far northeastern Brazil from Rio Grande do Norte south to Sergipe and northeastern Bahia

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: caerae is found in northeastern Brazil from Ceará and Rio Grande do Norte south to Sergipe

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The nominate subspecies is found in northeastern Brazil in an area roughtly bounded by eastern Piauí, Rio Grande do Norte, and northern Minas Gerais

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: brasiliensis is found in the Atlantic Forest of southeastern Brazil approximately from Rio Grande do Norte south to Espírito Santo

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: naumburgae is found in a small area of northeastern Brazil between the states of Rio Grande do Norte and Alagoas. The white-bellied tody-tyrant's nominate subspecies inhabits a variety of humid forest types both primary and secondary

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: niveus is found in northeastern Brazil from Ceará and Rio Grande do Norte south to Minas Gerais and Espírito Santo
